reasoning: Building twin for the proposed 5-story Nelray apartment. The authoritative geometry and room/unit boundaries come from the APS Model Derivative of 5 Story Apartment.rvt, but that extraction (WS-1 Part A) is BLOCKED because APS credentials are not yet in .env. This atom is therefore PROVISIONAL: story count, building type, and the floor-plan room inventory are taken from docs/property_ground_truth.md, and the APS model URN / per-element spatial refs are clearly-marked placeholders with a TODO for backfill. The atom exists now so the deal molecule and the entitlement finding can compose against it; WS-4 (APS viewer) consumes the URN once filled.
